profit-calculator: You can manually override any input cost by checking the 'Override' box.
The Break-Even price accounts for your entered Tax Rate (default 15%).
Use the Share button to generate a URL with your current configuration.
Click the Star icon in Exchange Tracker to quickly access resources here.
exchange-tracker: Prices update every 5 minutes per SimCompanies rate limits.
The 'Spread' is the difference between the lowest and next-lowest listing.
Use the Compare button to plot multiple resources on the same chart.
The 30d Average helps you spot if current prices are inflated.
production-chain: Scroll to zoom in/out of the tree view.
Toggle 'Buy' on any node to calculate cost based on market price instead of production.
The red/green badge at the bottom shows your profit margin instantly.
resource-optimizer: Enter your total production speed bonus to see accurate output per hour.
This tool ranks products by Profit/Hour, not just revenue.
Click 'Details' to open the Profit Calculator for a specific product.
building-advisor: Upgrade costs are estimates based on standard material prices.
ROI time calculates how long until the profit increase pays for the upgrade.
Consider admin overhead when upgrading past level 10.
